summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of the new Bidding System for B2B Cardamom Trading App. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). All 15 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The bidding system is fully functional.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/bids requires authentication (401 without auth)
BACKEND: POST /api/bids requires approved customer status (403 for pending)
BACKEND: POST /api/bids validates at least one quantity required (400)
BACKEND: POST /api/bids validates at least one price required (400)
BACKEND: POST /api/bids validates product exists (404 for invalid product_id)
BACKEND: POST /api/bids creates bid with quantity_kg and price_per_kg
BACKEND: POST /api/bids creates bid with quantity_lot and price_per_lot
BACKEND: POST /api/bids creates bid with both kg and lot quantities/prices
BACKEND: GET /api/bids/my requires authentication (401)
BACKEND: GET /api/bids/my returns only current customer's bids
BACKEND: GET /api/bids requires admin role (403 for customer)
BACKEND: GET /api/bids returns all bids for admin
BACKEND: GET /api/bids?status=pending filters bids by pending status
BACKEND: GET /api/bids?status=accepted filters bids by accepted status
BACKEND: GET /api/bids?status=rejected filters bids by rejected status
BACKEND: GET /api/bids/summary requires admin role (403 for customer)
BACKEND: GET /api/bids/summary returns bid counts (total, today, pending, accepted, rejected)
BACKEND: PUT /api/bids/{id} requires admin role (403 for customer)
BACKEND: PUT /api/bids/{id} admin accepts bid with admin_notes
BACKEND: PUT /api/bids/{id} admin rejects bid with admin_notes
BACKEND: PUT /api/bids/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent bid
BACKEND: Bid summary counts update correctly after accept/reject operations
FRONTEND: ProductDetail page has 'Place a Bid' button (data-testid='product-detail-place-bid')
FRONTEND: Clicking 'Place a Bid' without auth shows login modal
FRONTEND: Bid modal opens for logged-in approved customer (data-testid='bid-modal')
FRONTEND: Bid modal has all form fields (quantity_kg, quantity_lot, price_per_kg, price_per_lot, currency, market_type, notes)
FRONTEND: Bid modal validates at least 1 qty and 1 price before submit (shows error toast)
FRONTEND: Bid submission works and shows success toast, modal closes
FRONTEND: CustomerDashboard has 'My Bids' tab (data-testid='customer-tab-bids')
FRONTEND: Customer bids table shows columns: Product, Size, Quantity, Price, Currency, Status, Date
FRONTEND: Customer bids table displays bid rows with correct data
FRONTEND: AdminDashboard has 'Bids' tab (data-testid='admin-tab-bids')
FRONTEND: Admin Bids tab shows summary cards (Total, Today, Pending, Accepted, Rejected)
FRONTEND: Admin Bids tab has filter buttons (all, pending, accepted, rejected)
FRONTEND: Admin bids table shows columns: Customer, Product, Qty, Price, Market, Date, Status, Actions
FRONTEND: Admin can accept bid with optional notes (accept-bid-{id}, bid-notes-{id})
FRONTEND: Admin can reject bid with optional notes (reject-bid-{id})

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple test customers with patterns: TEST_bidcust_*, TEST_pending_*, TEST_playwright_*, TEST_pw2_*, TEST_custdash_*@example.com

seed_data_creation: Test bids created during API and UI testing. Admin user auto-created on server startup. Products re-initialized on each server restart.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bidding system fully tested and working. Key endpoints: POST /api/bids (approved customer auth, validates qty+price), GET /api/bids/my (customer's bids), GET /api/bids (admin, supports ?status filter), GET /api/bids/summary (admin, returns counts), PUT /api/bids/{id} (admin accept/reject with notes). Frontend data-testids: product-detail-place-bid, bid-modal, bid-form, bid-quantity-kg, bid-quantity-lot, bid-price-kg, bid-price-lot, bid-currency, bid-market-type, bid-notes, bid-submit-btn, customer-tab-bids, customer-bids-table, admin-tab-bids, admin-bids-table, bids-filter-all/pending/accepted/rejected, accept-bid-{id}, reject-bid-{id}, bid-notes-{id}. Email notifications are logged but not sent (SMTP not configured - expected behavior).
